data.name: Elven Trip
data.detailed_description:
She had to see the statue again, she had to seek it out in the forgotten hallway where it stood motionless, forgotten… and untouched. The young elf priestess couldn’t resist her lascivious thoughts any longer, a hand reaching out to caress the statue oh so intimately. But what’s this? Suddenly the golem is coming to stony rigid life – right in her hand! What happens next is sexy, wild and oh so satisfying to the elven magical girl seeking new adventures!

Key Features

• Quad HD (2560x1440 pixels) resolution graphics

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes

• Elf’s and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: The quest for the Stone Statue turned out to be even more successful than an elf sorceress thought! The statue came to life, but that wasn't what caught the girl's attention. It was the golem's huge shaft, literally rock hard, and the monster didn't mind rewarding her for the completed quest!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
